description_long: This object is a classic Apple Macintosh computer monitor, featuring a boxy, off-white plastic enclosure with a built-in CRT display. The front face showcases a grayscale screen with a visible graphical user interface, a horizontal slot beneath the display, and a small, colorful Apple logo in the lower left corner. The rear panel includes a prominent Macintosh label, a vented section for cooling, a power switch, and a detailed information sticker. Both side panels are plain, with subtle venting at the bottom for airflow. The monitor's overall design is utilitarian, with sharp edges and a slightly sloped top, characteristic of 1980s personal computers. The object appears robust and solid, with minimal decorative elements aside from the brand logo.
description: A vintage Apple Macintosh computer monitor with a built-in CRT display, off-white plastic casing, and a colorful Apple logo on the front.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the Macintosh label, information sticker, power switch, and ventilation grilles.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying a plain, featureless panel with subtle venting at the bottom.
description_view_2: Front view featuring the CRT screen, disk slot, and colorful Apple logo at the lower left.
description_view_3: Right side view, similar to the left, with a plain surface and bottom venting.
attribute_screen_bezel_design: The bezel is thick, off-white plastic with squared edges and slightly rounded corners, matching the body color. It is visually plain with no decorative elements, providing a robust frame around the CRT display.
attribute_stand_type: The monitor has an integrated flat base, forming part of the main enclosure, with no visible separate stand or adjustability features.
attribute_button_placement: A power switch is visible on the rear panel, and there may be small buttons or controls near the disk slot on the front, but no grouped or prominent buttons are visible.
attribute_brand_logo: A colorful Apple logo is present on the lower left corner of the front bezel, featuring the classic rainbow stripes.
